tagline: A family-owned, GAF-certified Santa Rosa roofer — owner John on site for every install, with a perfect 5-star record.
seoDescription: Guardian Roofing: family-owned, GAF-certified roofing in Santa Rosa since 2019. CSLB #1062288. Re-roofs, repairs, TPO & metal. 5.0★ rated.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa roofing you can stand behind
heroSubheading: A family-owned, GAF-certified roofer where owner John — born and raised in Sonoma County — is on site for the whole install. Re-roofs, repairs, metal and commercial TPO across Sonoma, Napa and Marin.
highlights: Owner John on site for the entire install
aboutBody: Guardian Roofing is a family-owned, licensed roofing company started in 2019 by John, who was born and raised in Sonoma County and brings more than a decade of roofing experience to every job. He runs Guardian alongside his wife Heather, who keeps the office responsive and the schedule on track.

What sets Guardian apart is that John isn’t just the owner — he’s the project manager on site for the entirety of each install, demanding quality and clear communication from estimate to cleanup. As a GAF-certified contractor (CSLB #1062288), the team handles everything from CertainTeed Landmark shingle re-roofs to metal and heat-welded commercial TPO, for homes and businesses across Sonoma, Napa and Marin.

services.title: Re-roofing & roof replacement
services.description: Full tear-off and replacement with GAF and CertainTeed Landmark shingle systems, installed to manufacturer spec.

services.title: Roof repair & maintenance
services.description: Leak repairs, dry-rot fixes and maintenance that extend the life of your existing roof.

services.title: Commercial TPO roofing
services.description: Single-ply TPO membrane installed with a top-of-the-line heat-welding machine for durable, energy-efficient flat roofs.

services.title: Metal roofing
services.description: Long-lasting metal roof systems for homes and commercial buildings across the North Bay.

services.title: New construction
services.description: Roofing for new residential and commercial builds, coordinated to your project timeline.

services.title: Gutters & inspections
services.description: Gutter installation and thorough roof inspections to catch problems before they start.

testimonials.quote: John is not only the owner but also the project manager who was on site for the entirety of the roof install. He is a person of integrity, demands quality, and is highly skilled in his craft. His estimate was very reasonable and he communicated well.
testimonials.author: Santa Rosa homeowner

testimonials.quote: The owner, John, was prompt, informative and on site doing great work. His wife Heather, in the office, was always cheerful, informative and responsive. The main employee, Chris, was always working hard with a friendly presentation.
testimonials.author: Sonoma County customer

notes: Verified via guardianroofllc.com + Yelp/Angi/HomeAdvisor/BBB (Jun 2026). Family-owned; started 2019 by owner John (Sonoma County native, 13+ yrs roofing) with wife Heather in office; CSLB #1062288; GAF-certified. 5.0★ across review sites (exact count not public — left 0). Testimonials are real, attributed by area. Photos are real project shots from their site.
